_source: Hand-authored from Warhammer: The Horus Heresy 3rd Ed — Liber Astartes (Loyalist Legiones Astartes Army Book). Wargear Lists p21; datasheets at the printed page noted per unit. Overrides BSData-derived wargear/specialRules/traits/options for accuracy.

options: The Sergeant may exchange their bolter and/or bolt pistol — select from the Legion Sergeant Melee Weapons List
